title: {YTP} ~ Nintedno Week
description:
Back when we didn't have to worry about crap like Nintedno Land and the WiiiW. And yes, "Nintedno" is spelled that way on purpose.

This is actually a revamped version of "Nintendo Weak", an old WMM video of mine. It's since been deleted, but this version is nicer. Also, Throwback videos will be provided as links in the description from now on. It's better for the video's stand-alone quality that way.


Support me: https://elliespectacular.com/support

FAQ: https://elliespectacular.com/faq

DaThings2: http://www.youtube.com/user/DaThings2
